title: Stack Cutaway
caption: A federated architecture for turning signal into protected meaning.
body: Establishes the system as layered infrastructure.

title: Culture Is Not Metadata
caption: Culture is not decoration around data. It changes the behavior of the system.
body: Sets the philosophical and technical rule.

title: Sensorium Layer
caption: Meaning enters through body, voice, sound, and movement.
body: Shows embodied input as primary, not peripheral.

title: Latent Space
caption: Fragments are organized by felt proximity, not file order.

title: Conductor Layer
caption: The system uses rules to prevent machine over-smoothing.
body: Shows designed resistance inside the pipeline.

title: Stage Layer
caption: Processed meaning becomes something you can move through.

title: Veracity Shield
caption: Outputs must be audited before they are allowed to become claims.
body: Makes trust a system feature, not a vibes-based séance.

title: Four Deployments
caption: The stack is shared infrastructure across sonic, memory, epistemic, and spatial projects.

title: Biological Mismatch
caption: Human bodies are forced to parse systems built for extraction and acceleration.
body: Names the human stakes of the architecture.

title: Sovereign Infrastructure
caption: The stack points toward cultural systems that can be governed without erasing difference.

title: Architecture Paper Needed
caption: The stack needs a public architecture paper to become legible outside the Archive.

title: No Output Without Friction
caption: The system’s ethics appear in what it refuses to complete.
